nasb.text: So the Lord our God delivered Og also, king of Bashan, with all his people into our hand, and we smote them until no survivor was left.

esv.text: So the Lord our God gave into our hand Og also, the king of Bashan, and all his people, and we struck him down until he had no survivor left.

cnv.text: 於是耶和華我們的　神也把巴珊王噩和他的眾民都交在我們的手裡；我們擊殺了他們，沒有留下一個存活的人。

ccb.text: “我们的上帝耶和华把巴珊王噩及其众民交在我们手中，我们杀了他们，一个不留。
